creator: @sethgolie
transcript: Yo, I'm hitting Wendy's. Give me that Baconator meal with a large Coke, large fry. Let's throw in a six piece nuggets and don't forget the ranch. Yeah man, I'm down for Wendy's. I'm gonna go ahead and get the grilled chicken wrap. I'm gonna get a small side of chili and then a small side salad with light ranch and then a large Diet Coke. Oh man, that actually sounds bomb. A lot healthier too. Yeah, I've actually been able to lose 20 pounds while still going out to eat and eating foods that I love. Wait, what? How'd you do that? My coach, Seth G., he makes fat loss simpler. Man, I got 20 pounds to lose myself. I'm gonna make sure to follow Seth G. right now.
caption: Try this order from Wendy's if you are crunched for time but still want to stay on track? Grilled chicken wrap, small chili, side salad with light ranch and a large Diet Coke - 730 calories and 42 G protein. This will save you over 1,000+ calories from a typical order and still give you 42 G protein. I'm not saying to eat out like this all the time but when in a time crunch this can help you stay on track with your fitness journey. Save for later. Send to a friend. Follow for daily fitness and nutrition tips. #macros #nutritiontips #fitover40 #fitover30
ocr_summary: Original: 2140 CALORIES, 78G PROTEIN. Swap: 730 CALORIES, 42G PROTEIN.

swaps.original_meal: Baconator meal (large Coke, large fry, 6-piece nuggets, ranch)
swaps.swap_meal: Grilled Chicken Wrap + Small Chili + Side Salad (light ranch) + Large Diet Coke

parsed.notes: Single swap. Compares typical Wendy's Baconator combo meal (2140 cal) vs a lighter grilled chicken wrap + chili + salad combo (730 cal). Saves 1400+ calories. Same creator format as Position 47 — two guys skit with split-screen calorie comparison.
